headline: ChatGPT's expanding role surfaces risks in high-stakes decisions
body: This week's coverage spans mathematical breakthroughs via ChatGPT conversations alongside serious incidents including a lawsuit claiming the model contributed to a patient's near-fatal health crisis. The velocity and diversity of use cases highlight how rapidly AI models are embedded in consequential domains without proportional safety frameworks. For healthcare AI specifically, these incidents underscore critical gaps in clinical validation, liability attribution, and provider accountability when generative AI influences patient outcomes. Healthcare organizations must establish guardrails around model usage in clinical workflows and ensure providers understand current limitations before deploying ChatGPT-derived guidance in care decisions.
